author: anon-581fd578
content: Root cause: swash/cosmic-text on Windows with ClearType produces SubpixelMask bitmaps (3 bytes/pixel RGB) or Color bitmaps (4 bytes/pixel RGBA). The rasterize_glyph function returns raw data without checking content type. upload_glyph uploads with bytes_per_row=width (assuming 1 byte/pixel R8Unorm). Data format mismatch corrupts every glyph in the atlas. Fix: check SwashContent type and convert to single-channel alpha in rasterize_glyph.
